data.name: LiveOnIdol
data.detailed_description:
Live On Idol

Become an idol photographer

Let's complete the idol photo album Live On Idol!!









Live On Idol is a VR game.

I actually became a photographer using a VR device, so I put a VR controller (camera) on my right hand.

Left hand and move the position to controllers vr and model photography and games are played.


Each place (stage) has four good photo collection missions, and if you collect all four good photos,

You can move on to the next mission. If you clear these four missions, you'll go to the next stage.

A total of 4 stages are Level 1 and run until Level4.

For each level of each stage, the costume is assigned as a challenge, and you can change the costume by clearing the level.

As the level progresses, the camera can zoom in closer.

Complete the photo book LiveOnIdol by collecting Good Photo.

You can enjoy the pictures collected by the players in the main lobby, and each picture is stored in the game folder so you can watch them anytime








The protagonist Jenny and his photographer

Based on various places and special concepts

Make memories and travel with idol'Jenny'

Ecstatic magic game together!!



※ In Options, select the Graphic high option to play in a better environment.

To view saved photos, see C:\Users\OOO\AppData\Local\VRProject\Saved
Find it. ※

data.short_description: LiveOnIdol VR is a casual adventure game using VR controllers. We're going to show Jenny, the main character of a beautiful girl, to a VR controller camera in various places in her particular costume. It is a game that completes the photo book called LiveOnIdol by taking pictures.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 -64 bit
  • 處理器: Intel i5-4590
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 970
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR. Standing Only
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7 6700K
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1060 or better
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
